chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 310 of 2019 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.1079/2019 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 30.11.2023 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Syed Mahmood Ghaznavi, Assistant Director, Regional Directorate of Colleges, Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner submits that petitioner has already filed a representation for reinstatement in service before the Secretary, College Education Department, Government of Sindh, Karachi, and if the said Secretary is directed to decide his representation within a reasonable time, he would be satisfied. With the consent of learned AAG, the concerned Secretary is directed to decide the representation, if any, filed by the petitioner within three months, and submit compliance report. The petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
